name: AIProtal
description: AIProtal is a Linux / Windows AI launcher with a dedicated desktop shell for precise toggle and focus workflows.

scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.package:deb: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --linux deb --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:exe: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:release: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --x64 --publish never
